message:
refactor(obligation): make Interaction::then() fallible and remove builder panic

Interaction::then() now returns Result<Interaction, ChoreographyBuildError>
instead of panicking when called on interaction kinds that do not support
direct chaining. New ChoreographyBuildError::InvalidContinuationTarget
variant with Display impl identifies the offending interaction kind.

New kind_name() helper returns a static label for each Interaction variant.
ProtocolBuilder::build() no longer panics on missing interaction —
it defaults to Interaction::End so validation can reject it
deterministically.

All call sites updated to use .expect() or ? with descriptive messages.
Doc examples and codegen tests updated accordingly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
